text: Dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi kyunki bedridden pati ki seva se badan toot raha tha, par asli darr ye hai ki koi meri depression ki goliyaan na dekh le. Agar bahu-bete ko pata chala toh wo kahenge ki budhape mein 'natak' kar rahi hoon aur khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Main bas thakan ka bahana banakar chup rehti hoon taaki ghar ki shanti aur bacchon ka mujh par bharosa bana rahe.

Main shaadi mein nahi ja saki aur sabne socha umra ka taqaza hai, par main andar se dimaagi taur par bimar hoon aur ye baat batane se darti hoon. Main apni antidepressants ki strip takiye ke neeche chhupati hoon taaki bete ko dukh na ho aur ghar mein kalesh na shuru ho jaye. Generational gap itna hai ki wo meri loneliness ko samajh nahi payenge, isliye main bas 'sharir ki thakan' bol kar sabke samne muskurati hoon.

Caregiving burnout ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main bed se uth nahi paayi, par sabko yahi bola ki 'ghutno ka dard' badh gaya hai. Main depression word use nahi kar sakti kyunki parivaar mein ise pagalpan mana jata hai aur main ghar ki maryada bachane ke liye ye bojh akele utha rahi hoon. Rishton mein doori na aaye aur log humein ignore na karein, isiliye main apni goliyaan andhere mein chup-chap kha leti hoon.

Shaadi miss hone par jab bahu ne poocha toh maine bas 'sar dard' ka bahana kiya, kyunki main nahi chahti ki unhe lage ki unki saas dimaagi taur par kamzor ho gayi hai. Joint family mein buzurgon ka tootna shubh nahi mana jata, isliye main apni sacchai daba rahi hoon taaki ghar ka mahaul kharab na ho. Main apni prescription phaar kar phenk deti hoon taaki bacchon ki nazron mein meri 'izzat' kam na ho.

Jab saheli ne shaadi ki tasveerein dikhayi toh mera dum ghutne laga, par maine bas 'hospital ka kharcha' aur kamzori ka zikr karke baat tal di. Main nahi chahti ki ghar walon ko meri depression ka ehsas ho warna wo darr jayenge ki 'log kya kahenge' agar unki maa ko doctor ke paas le jana pada. Parivaar ki shaan ke liye main apni mental health neglect karti hoon aur ek adarsh dadi ka mask pehne rakhti hoon.
